agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Enhancing steric complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3 and TM5/TM6 regio

report.hypothesis: Enhancing steric complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3 and TM5/TM6 regions by introducing bulky hydrophobic residues at positions 5 and 11 will increase selectivity margin without compromising SSTR2 binding affinity.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design strategy is generating highly stable binders with good select

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is generating highly stable binders with good selectivity, but structural instability is limiting pass rate. Tightening structural filters and introducing targeted mutations at non-pharmacophore positions will improve robustness and selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Clash filtering is too lenient, allowing structurally unstable candidates to pass. Tightening the threshold will improve structural quality and reduce false positives.
To enhance selectivity, we need to disrupt off-target interactions at non-pharmacophore positions. Focusing mutations at these positions can help break conserved-pocket contacts with SSTR3/SSTR5.
